schedule.title: Venue Walk-through
schedule.description: Couple and coordinator visit the venue to finalise layout and confirm all bookings.

schedule.title: Floral Arrangement Review
schedule.description: Florist presents final floral samples for approval before the wedding day.

schedule.title: Rehearsal
schedule.description: Full wedding rehearsal at the venue. All key persons to attend.

schedule.title: Venue Setup Begins
schedule.description: Florist and catering team arrive to begin decorating the hall and setting up tables with floral arrangements.

schedule.title: Bridal Party Hair & Makeup
schedule.description: Bridal party assembles at the bridal suite for professional hair and makeup styling.

schedule.title: Photographer Pre-Shoot
schedule.description: Individual and couple portraits taken before the ceremony begins in the hotel gardens.

schedule.title: Guest Arrival
schedule.description: Ushers guide guests to their seats. MC welcomes guests at the main entrance.

schedule.title: Wedding Ceremony
schedule.description: Main ceremony begins. Photographer captures all key moments of the ceremony.

schedule.title: Reception Dinner Begins
schedule.description: Catering lead ensures all courses are served on schedule.

schedule.title: Cake Cutting & First Dance
schedule.description: Couple cuts wedding cake followed by their first dance. Photographer captures the moment.

schedule.title: Guest Departure & Transport
schedule.description: Transport coordinator ensures all guests have arranged transport home safely.

schedule.title: Venue Clearance
schedule.description: Florist and catering teams collect their equipment and clear the venue.
